changes: Blade of Faith: Potency has been increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Blade of Truth: Potency has been increased from 6,000 to 7,000.
Draw and Junction: Action can now be used to target self and party members. The additional effect Powder Barrel will only be granted when targeting an enemy.
Soul Resonance: Now grants the effect Apocatastasis.
Miracle of Nature: Recast time has been increased from 25 to 30 seconds.
Afflatus Purgation: Cure potency of the Regen effect granted by Temperance has been reduced from 4,000 to 3,000.
Aspected Benefic: Cure potency of Diurnal Benefic has been increased from 1,000 to 2,000.
Aspected Benefic: Effect duration of Diurnal Benefic has been increased from 12 to 15 seconds.
Aspected Benefic: Barrier potency of Nocturnal Benefic has been increased from 4,000 to 5,000.

new_content.name: Crystalline Conflict
new_content.description: Season Seven will end and Season Eight will begin.

new_content.name: Omega Protocol (Ultimate)
new_content.description: Resolved an issue where players would erroneously take damage when reentering the tower after successfully removing the Looper status effect.

new_content.name: Instance Management
new_content.description: The division of Radz-at-Han and Thavnair into multiple instances has been removed.
